news.paragraph: Recent market activity shows exchange-traded funds trending lower following a decline in US equities and the release of hot inflation data. Options traders should also account for potential volatility surrounding an upcoming US-China meeting. These macroeconomic and geopolitical developments provide the current backdrop for small-cap movement.
headlines: Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Mixed Pre-Bell Wednesday Ahead of US-China Meeting
